title: 八重の勝利は無敵の証

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Yaeno Muteki and I are going to be
interviewed by Reporter Etsuko Otonashi.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: How incredible!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You wanted to challenge the Eternal Top Three in
order to prove that you're the star of your
generation?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's exactly right.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And you've defeated them so many times! You've
really stuck to your word—simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Who would have thought that would be the
motivation behind your legacy!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But wouldn't it be better for you to express this to
the world directly? I don't think this kind of
passion can be communicated through writing
alone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that's how Yaeno Muteki came to have this in-person event hosted by Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My desire to surpass the Eternal Top Three has
driven me forward single-mindedly, and before I
realized it, I had accumulated win after win.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! So you want to be the star of your
generation! But of course you would, you're
Yaeno Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You're already the star of your generation! Just
look at how many times you've defeated the
Eternal Top Three—you're totally unbeatable!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Me? Unbeatable?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That's right! All those wins are proof that no one
holds a candle to you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan D
text_block_list.text: Keep on dominating out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Muteki! Muteki! Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Calls of Muteki's name echo throughout the
room. All of a sudden, I'm struck by the sensation
of being at a racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Yaeno Muteki standing in the winner's circle
and the audience screaming her name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Muteki! Muteki! Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: This is what I've wanted for so long...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text: This? ...Oh, you mean cheers like Oguri gets?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I've been aiming to give such a race that I
would enchant people the way she does. I believe
she has the presence befitting a true star of one's
generation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Just winning isn't enough. In that respect, I still
haven't surpassed Oguri or the others.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must continue working hard until I can run in a
way that's becoming of the star of my generation
and peak of racing.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Then, we're with you! If there's anything we can
do to help, we'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's fan base wasn't built overnight either! It
grew one person at a time! So if we focus our
energies on supporting you, we can do something!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Let's make a Yaeno Muteki fan club! That way all
us fans can keep in easy contact!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan A
text_block_list.text:
We'll do whatever we can to help you, Yaeno
Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm so incredibly happy! Thank you all from the
very bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The event is a great success. The fans leave in
groups, still excitedly chatting amongst
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I can't believe the people who support
me are so passionate!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's why something inside is burning so
hot now. I can feel my hunger for competition
raging within me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This must be how Oguri feels when she converts
her fans' support into power...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Being able to fill the stands is wonderful,
but there's something great about sharing a
strong bond with your supporters as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I feel truly blessed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki smiles joyfully. It seems her
countless victories have rewarded her with a
priceless connection to her fans.
